rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FREDERICK MAISEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Amending Order Denying Motion To Dismiss Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property To Trust, For Double Damages , And For Damages For Financial Elder Abuse And Legal Malpractice
rulings.Rulings: The motion to amend the order is GRANTED. The substance of the proposed order submitted by counsel for Elaine Andrews is acceptable tot he Court and reflects the Court's analysis after the hearing on July 3, 2014. The prevailing party shall submit a proposed order (with new date). If argument is requested, please notify the court and opposing counsel no later than September 3, 2014 by 2:00 p.m.
